game.title.description: Name of the Mahjong Solitaire game card.
game.title.notes: Do not translate the game name.

game.description.description: One-line description on the Mahjong Solitaire game card.

game.playLabel.description: Accessibility label for the Mahjong Solitaire play button.

game.canvasLabel.description: Accessible label for the game canvas — describes the game and interaction.

hud.score.description: Short uppercase label for the current score in the HUD.

hud.pairs.description: Short uppercase label for the number of remaining tile pairs in the HUD.

hud.time.description: Short uppercase label for the elapsed timer in the HUD.

hud.deal.description: Short uppercase label preceding the 4-char deal ID code in the HUD (e.g. 'DEAL #A3F2').
hud.deal.notes: Displayed small and muted. The code after the label is always '#' followed by 4 uppercase hex chars and is never translated.

action.newGameLabel.description: Accessibility label for the new-game button.

action.shuffleLabel.description: Accessibility label for the shuffle button.

action.undoLabel.description: Accessibility label for the undo button.

overlay.noMoves.description: Large heading on the no-moves overlay when no tile pairs are available.

overlay.noMovesDetail.description: Detail line under the no-moves heading, explaining what to do next.

overlay.youWon.description: Large heading on the win overlay when all tiles are cleared.

overlay.youWonDetail.description: Detail line showing how many pairs were cleared on the win overlay.
overlay.youWonDetail.notes: {{count}} is the total number of matched pairs (72 for a full Turtle board).

overlay.shuffleButton.description: Button label on the no-moves overlay to trigger a shuffle.

overlay.newGameButton.description: Button label on the win overlay to start a fresh game.

layout.turtle.description: Display name for the Turtle board layout.
layout.turtle.notes: Named after the turtle shape formed by the tile arrangement. Translate the animal name naturally.

score.display.description: Accessibility label for the score display.

scoreboard.title.description: Heading for the Mahjong Solitaire scoreboard.

scoreboard.rank.description: Column header for rank position in the leaderboard.

scoreboard.player.description: Column header for the player name in the leaderboard.

scoreboard.score.description: Column header for the score value in the leaderboard.

scoreboard.empty.description: Empty state message when no scores have been submitted yet.
